title: Vaccine update: issue 301, September 2019
body: " case study of Wrenbury Primary School new resources for school teams  HPV programme printed and digital resources vaccine supply for the 2019 to 2020 flu programme children’s flu vaccine ordering information inactivated flu vaccine ordering  MMR vaccine ordering all influenza vaccines for the 2019 to 2020 season ordering additional Gardasil for the universal HPV immunisation programme update to Bexsero patient information leaflet (PIL) placing deferred orders on ImmForm the EU Falsified Medicines Directive (FMD) and Delegated Regulation as applicable to PHE  vaccine supply for the non routine programme   "
